Leanpay is a fast-growing fintech operating as a licensed Non-Bank Financial Institution (NBFI) in Romania, on a mission to enable any consumer to make any purchase in any shop by providing responsible, fair and easy financing. We combine cutting-edge technology with transparent, people-first products; from point-of-sale consumer credit and BNPL to digital lending, serving both retail customers and merchant partners across the country.


We are currently expanding our Leanpay Romania

Founded in 2006, One Acre Fund equips 5.5 million smallholder farmers to make their farms more productive. items.title: Director of Financial Planning and Analysis
items.description:
Fastned | 
Fastned is on a mission to accelerate the transition to electric mobility. Since 2012, we have been building and operating a rapidly growing network of iconic fast-charging stations across Europe powered entirely by solar and wind energy. We now operate over 400 stations across nine countries, with an ambitious goal of reaching 1,000 stations by 2030. We are not building infrastructure for its own sake. Every station we open is a tangible step in the transition away from fossil fuels.

items.title: Head of Investment Portfolio & Derivatives (M/F)
items.description:
Banque Internationale à Luxembourg (BIL) | 
Founded in 1856, Banque Internationale à Luxembourg is the oldest multi-business bank in the Grand Duchy. From its foundation, the BIL has always played an active role in the development of the Luxembourg economy. It currently operates in retail, private and corporate banking, as well as on major capital markets. Employing more than 2 000 people, BIL is present in the financial hotspots that are Luxembourg, Switzerland, and China.
